prompt: Implement reverse_string(text), returning the characters in reverse order.
Implement valid_parentheses(text). The input contains only ()[]{}. Return whether every bracket is correctly matched and nested.
Implement binary_search(values, target) for an ascending list of distinct integers. Return the target index or -1 when absent.
Implement max_subarray(values), returning the maximum sum of a non-empty contiguous subarray.
